content.json:
## Performance Dashboard
Operation speed and reliability. Latency uses `customMeasurements.durationMs`; only successful ops are timed.

content.query:
customEvents
| where name endswith "/queryEditor.queryCompleted"
| where isempty(tostring(customDimensions.errorCategory))
| extend duration = toreal(customMeasurements.durationMs)
| where isnotnull(duration)
| summarize P50 = percentile(duration, 50), P95 = percentile(duration, 95), P99 = percentile(duration, 99), Count = count() by bin(timestamp, 1d)
| order by timestamp asc
| render timechart
content.title: Query Latency (P50/P95/P99, ms)

content.query:
customEvents
| where name endswith "/ragChat.requestCompleted"
| where isempty(tostring(customDimensions.errorCategory))
| extend duration = toreal(customMeasurements.durationMs)
| where isnotnull(duration)
| summarize P50 = percentile(duration, 50), P95 = percentile(duration, 95), P99 = percentile(duration, 99) by bin(timestamp, 1d)
| order by timestamp asc
| render timechart
content.title: RAG Chat Latency (P50/P95/P99, ms)

content.query:
customEvents
| where name endswith "Completed" or name endswith ".completed"
| extend IsError = isnotempty(tostring(customDimensions.errorCategory))
| summarize SuccessRatePct = round(100.0 * countif(not(IsError)) / count(), 2) by Operation = tostring(split(name, "/")[-1])
| order by SuccessRatePct asc
| render barchart
content.title: Success Rate by Operation (%)

content.query:
customEvents
| where name endswith "/connection.connectCompleted"
| extend IsError = isnotempty(tostring(customDimensions.errorCategory))
| summarize Total = count(), Failures = countif(IsError) by bin(timestamp, 1d)
| extend SuccessRatePct = round(100.0 * (Total - Failures) / Total, 2)
| project timestamp, SuccessRatePct, Failures
| order by timestamp asc
| render timechart
content.title: Connection Success Rate Over Time

content.query:
customEvents
| extend duration = toreal(customMeasurements.durationMs)
| where duration > 10000
| project timestamp, Operation = tostring(split(name, "/")[-1]), durationMs = duration, result = tostring(customDimensions.result)
| order by durationMs desc
| take 100
content.title: Slow Operations (>10s)
